full_text:
Li Fu (Sunde) 李福 (孫德)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Fu (李福), styledSunde (孫德), was born in Fu in Zitong prefecture. Chief Secretary. Sent by Liu Shan to check on the dying Zhuge Liang. Li Fu was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
